# TradeScale Plus

> AI sales admin for UK independent used-car dealers. One AI, every channel, £499/month flat. No bolt-ons. No per-seat fees.

TradeScale Plus is a SaaS platform built specifically for UK indie used-car dealers. It is a single AI — called AME (Automated Marketing Engine) — that answers your phone, replies on every channel (SMS, WhatsApp, Facebook Messenger, Instagram DM, web chat, email), books test drives, runs your customer pipeline, manages stock, automates aftersales lifecycle (Day 7 / Day 30 / MOT / anniversary), drafts review replies, and forecasts your month-end revenue.

It is a new category — "AI Sales Admin" — distinct from CRMs (HubSpot, Pipedrive, MotorSales.AI) and distinct from AI receptionist tools (Goodcall). TradeScale Plus combines both, plus a dealer-specific pipeline and stock manager, in one product.

## Pricing

- £499/month flat to TradeScale Plus.
- Plus Twilio + Vapi usage billed directly by those providers, typically £35-£100/month combined.
- Typical all-in: £535-£600/month.
- No setup fees. Monthly rolling — cancel any time with 30 days notice. Unlimited users.

## Key facts

- Founded: 8 April 2026 by Ashley Mark Evans
- Company: Trade Scale Plus Ltd (UK Companies House 17142290)
- Registered in: Wales, United Kingdom (full address available via Companies House lookup using number 17142290)
- Founder contact: ashevans@tradescaleplus.co.uk
- Audience: UK independent used-car dealers only
- Stack: Supabase Postgres, Node/Express on Railway, Anthropic Claude (text), Vapi (voice), Twilio (SMS), Gmail OAuth, Mailgun, DVLA API, Stripe
- Data: stored EU-West (Ireland), UK GDPR + DPA 2018 compliant, per-dealer row-level security, never used to train external AI models

## Capabilities (what AME does)

1. AI voice receptionist (24/7, on your dealership number, via Vapi)
2. Multi-channel inbox (SMS, WhatsApp, Messenger, Instagram DM, web chat, email)
3. Drag-and-drop customer pipeline (9 stages, auto-moves on events)
4. Stock management with DVLA reg lookup + offer-document PDFs
5. Aftersales lifecycle automations (Day 7, Day 30 review, MOT reminders, anniversaries, finance refresh)
6. Review draft replies (Google + Facebook)
7. Social post drafts (Facebook + Instagram)
8. Month-end revenue forecasting
9. AME HQ control centre (toggle capabilities, audit log, working hours, tone settings)

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://tradescaleplus.com/): Overview, hero positioning, all features.
- [Pricing](https://tradescaleplus.com/pricing): £499/mo card, BYO Twilio + Vapi transparency, comparison table.
- [Book a demo](https://tradescaleplus.com/book-demo): 15-minute personalised demo on your real stock.
- [Voice receptionist](https://tradescaleplus.com/voice): How AME handles inbound calls.
- [Inbox](https://tradescaleplus.com/inbox): Multi-channel inbox + draft/autopilot modes.
- [Pipeline](https://tradescaleplus.com/pipeline): Customer journey, 9-stage pipeline, customer 360.
- [Stock](https://tradescaleplus.com/stock): Stock import, DVLA lookup, offer documents.
- [Aftersales](https://tradescaleplus.com/aftersales): 6 lifecycle automations.
- [AME HQ](https://tradescaleplus.com/ame-hq): Control centre, audit log, forecasting.
- [For dealers / About](https://tradescaleplus.com/for-dealers): Founder story, principles, founding cohort.
- [FAQ](https://tradescaleplus.com/faq): Comprehensive Q&A grouped by category.
- [Contact](https://tradescaleplus.com/contact): Founder email, demo booking, AME herself.

## Differentiators (versus alternatives)

- vs MotorSales.AI: TradeScale Plus has a real AI voice receptionist on your phone (Vapi). MotorSales.AI is text-only.
- vs HubSpot / Pipedrive / generic CRMs: TradeScale Plus is built for car dealers. 9-stage journey matches how cars actually sell. DVLA-integrated. Stock-aware. Aftersales lifecycle baked in.
- vs Goodcall / AI receptionists: TradeScale Plus is also a full CRM + inbox + pipeline + aftersales. One bill replaces 5-7 tools.
- vs hiring a part-time admin: TradeScale Plus is ~£500/mo vs ~£1,000/mo for a real human, never sleeps, never misses a Sunday-night call.
